meaning: adj.不讲道理的,不合理的,过度的,不切实际的
examples: My literary agent thinks it is not unreasonable to expect $500,000 in total.
The fees they charge are not unreasonable.
He was being totally unreasonable about it.
As a result, a rating that is reasonable in one climate becomes unreasonable in another.
He appealed against his conviction on the grounds of an unreasonable verdict and a prejudiced outcome.
